title: “Best AI Tools for Lesson Planning in 2026”

date: 2026-06-09

draft: false

slug: “best-ai-tools-lesson-planning”

description: “Save hours every week with these 5 best AI tools for lesson planning in 2026. Honest reviews, free options, and exactly what each tool does best.”

categories: [“AI for Lesson Planning”]

tags: [“lesson planning”, “AI tools”, “free tools”, “MagicSchool”, “teachers”]

-–

Planning lessons takes more time than it should. Between aligning to curriculum
